prompts.prompt: Construct a multi-layered ethical decision framework that remains coherent across three incompatible moral theories (e.g., virtue ethics, utilitarianism, deontology). Stress-test it on an unforeseen AI governance dilemma set in the year 2100.
Fuse insights from quantum field theory, Mahayana Buddhist philosophy, and evolutionary psychology to propose a novel model of consciousness, then outline experiments that could falsify it.

Decompose your own reasoning algorithm into explicit epistemic operators (e.g., induction, abduction, Bayesian update). Identify where each operator might introduce bias and propose self-corrective safeguards.
Imagine Alan Turing had lived to see modern deep learning. Generate a counterfactual timeline showing how his extended influence might have altered AI research milestones and societal impact.
Map the current frontiers of scientific ignorance in cosmology, neuroscience, and linguistics. For each frontier, draft a research agenda that maximizes information gain per experimental dollar.
Create a chain of five escalating analogies that link black-hole thermodynamics to classroom pedagogy, ensuring each step preserves explanatory fidelity. Reflect on where the analogy breaks.
Compare three competing ontologies of time (presentism, eternalism, growing-block). Evaluate how each ontology would reinterpret quantum entanglement experiments.
Design a robotic embodiment scenario that could either confirm or refute the claim that subjective experience requires sensorimotor grounding. Outline measurable success criteria.
Given a dataset of hypothetical extraterrestrial signals exhibiting non-human symmetry and prime-number structures, propose a decoding protocol that minimizes anthropocentric bias.
Choose an axiomatic system in mathematics or logic. Remove or invert one foundational axiom and extrapolate the cascading consequences for both pure theory and applied technology.
Analyze how the co-evolution of language and tool use might differ for a species with sonar-based perception. Predict resultant shifts in abstract reasoning styles.
Formulate a philosophical argument about the nature of actual infinities versus potential infinities, then translate that argument into a formal proof sketch in ZFC set theory.
Generate a cross-modal creative work (text, visual, auditory) that embodies the concept of ‘emergent order from chaos.’ Provide a meta-analysis of how meaning shifts between modes.
Perform a three-round recursive review of your own output on any complex topic: round 1 draft, round 2 critical refutation, round 3 reconciled synthesis. Record reasoning deltas after each round.
Model three plausible futures in which superintelligent systems enforce radically different conceptions of ‘the good.’ For each scenario, identify ethical paradoxes that would challenge human values.
